summary: Week 1 focused on establishing baseline metrics and fixing tracking infrastructure. Your ads are performing above average for cold B2B — 2.17% CTR at $3.20/click. We identified and resolved a PostHog tracking gap, redesigned the landing page to reduce friction, and deployed granular CTA tracking. The foundation is set for Week 2 optimization.

funnel.title: Landing Page Funnel
funnel.notes: Median time: Landing → Click-through: 10s | Click-through → CTA: 1m 7s

findings.title: Tracking Gap Identified & Fixed
findings.description: We discovered and resolved a PostHog tracking issue early on. Corrected data reveals real engagement happening — 21.65% of visitors click through and 7.22% interact with a CTA.

findings.title: Funnel Optimization Opportunity
findings.description: The original landing page added an unnecessary decision step. By simplifying the user journey, we expect to see significant improvement in click-through and conversion rates.

actions.title: Redesigned Landing Page
actions.description: Consolidated into a single page with value prop, competitor comparison, all pricing tiers, and social proof.

actions.title: Optimized CTAs
actions.description: Hero CTAs now anchor to pricing section instead of booking demos.

actions.title: Added Granular Tracking
actions.description: Every CTA button now has a unique PostHog ID for engagement tracking.

actions.title: Updated Ad Destination
actions.description: Meta ad URL now points to the new optimized page.

nextSteps: CTA click-through rates on the new page (by button ID)
Which pricing tier gets the most engagement
Demo bookings (Enterprise) vs. free signups (other tiers)
Overall funnel conversion rate improvement vs. Week 1 baseline
